title: Fracture clinic follow-up
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports selected orthopaedic follow-up, stability review, weight-bearing, cast or fixation context, and return review for non-improving symptoms in specified fracture populations.

source.title: Fractures (non-complex): assessment and management — Recommendations
source.population: Children and adults with non-complex fractures managed in emergency or orthopaedic services.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected non-complex fracture assessment, documentation, imaging, weight-bearing, information, and follow-up contexts; partial for a generic fracture-follow-up workflow and not validated for UAE pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports selected orthopaedic follow-up, stability review, weight-bearing, cast or fixation context, and return review for non-improving symptoms in specified fracture populations.

assessment.text: Requires structured fracture documentation, image and report continuity, honest information, questions, treatment expectations, rehabilitation, mobilisation, weight-bearing, management-plan communication, and documentation.
assessment.rationale: Supports documentation, information and support for fracture-clinic follow-up; no clinical decision is generated.
